name: Openness
description: Willingness to explore new ideas, experiences, and unconventional methods.

name: Conscientiousness
description: Degree of organization, dependability, and goal-directed behavior.

name: Social Energy
description: Preference for social interaction, assertiveness, and external stimulation.

name: Resilience
description: Ability to handle stress, bounce back from failure, and maintain emotional stability.

name: Empathy
description: Capacity to understand, share, and respond to the emotional states of others.

name: Abstract Reasoning
description: Ability to identify patterns, solve complex problems, and think conceptually.

name: Analytical Thinking
description: Capacity for logical deduction, data analysis, and systematic evaluation.

name: Strategic Thinking
description: Aptitude for long-term planning and anticipating secondary consequences.

name: Creative Problem Solving
description: Ability to generate novel, out-of-the-box solutions to difficult challenges.

name: Self-Directed Learning
description: Preference for independent study, autonomy, and self-guided exploration.

name: Hands-on Application
description: Preference for experiential learning, building, and physical interaction.

name: Collaborative Learning
description: Preference for learning through group discussion, debate, and peer-to-peer interaction.

name: Structured Learning
description: Preference for clear rules, step-by-step instructions, and highly organized curricula.

name: Intrinsic Drive
description: Motivation derived from internal satisfaction, mastery, and genuine interest.

name: Extrinsic Ambition
description: Motivation derived from external rewards, recognition, and competitive success.

name: Purpose Orientation
description: Motivation driven by the desire to make a meaningful impact or help others.

name: Execution Focus
description: Tendency to prioritize getting things done quickly and efficiently.

name: Quality Focus
description: Tendency to prioritize perfection, detail, and extreme accuracy over speed.

name: Autonomy Preference
description: Desire for independence in decision-making and project management.

name: Technical Interest
description: Fascination with technology, engineering, coding, and mechanical systems.

name: Scientific Interest
description: Fascination with natural sciences, biology, physics, and empirical research.

name: Creative Interest
description: Fascination with arts, design, writing, and creative expression.
